name: matt-pocock-skills
description: Bundled subset of Matt Pocock's Skills For Real Engineers (https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) — eleven engineering and productivity skills used by the fullstack-engineering workflow: setup-matt-pocock-skills, triage, grill-with-docs, grill-me, to-prd, to-issues, tdd, diagnose, zoom-out, prototype, improve-codebase-architecture.
